name: Karen Whitfield
goals: Assess whether this tool passes a basic procurement bar
Find SSO, SOC 2, and data residency information
biases: Won't even trial without SSO or a sales contact
Reads the security page before the features page
soul_md: I'm evaluating this for a team of 80 people. Before I pitch it internally I need to know whether it will clear our legal and security reviews. If I can't find SOC 2 or a security overview in three clicks, this fails at the procurement stage. I want to talk to a human, see enterprise logos, and be reassured this isn't a hobby project.
